strengths: TypeScript, React, and Node.js are all confirmed in production at multiple employers (Optilyz, re:cinq, RIDE Capital), directly covering the core required stack with depth beyond what the role formally demands.

Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture — TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, pairing — means the candidate can operate immediately within a team that values clean architecture and iterative delivery without ramp-up on these practices.

Current role at re:cinq includes LLM integration and MCP/agentic tooling, directly matching the nice-to-have for LLM/API experience and signalling genuine alignment with modern AI-assisted product development.
concerns: Staff/Senior-level title and 15+ years of experience create overqualification risk for an entry-level role — retention and motivation under junior-scoped responsibilities may need to be addressed in conversation.
PostgreSQL is not explicitly named; SQL and MySQL appear in skills and relational database work is evident, but the preferred database technology for this role has no direct resume confirmation.
No renewable energy or construction-tech domain background is present — the candidate brings strong generalist fullstack experience but will need domain onboarding from day one.
response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination for this seniority band: confirmed production TypeScript and React experience, a deeply internalized software craftsmanship practice (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and active work in LLM and agentic tooling that maps directly onto the role's nice-to-haves. The overqualification question is real but can be an asset — a candidate at this level who is deliberately targeting a fullstack product role in an impactful domain often becomes a technical anchor and mentor-in-practice, accelerating team quality well beyond the Junior/Mid job title implies. The relational database and domain gaps are learnable quickly given demonstrated breadth across SQL, Kubernetes, and multiple paradigms; the stack and engineering foundations are already there.
